title: Electro-Technical Officer
description:
• Responsible for the efficient maintenance, condition and upkeep of all electrical equipment, appliances, and fittings onboard under his charge.
  • Keep day-to-day record of all work carried out and in connection with the electrical equipment, machinery, and lighting onboard.
  • Plan preventive maintenance of all items of work, submit the same to the Chief Engineer for approval and thereafter carry out repairs and maintenance.
  • To ensure safe installation, overhauling, and repair of electrical work, maintain a six-monthly megger reading record of all power and lighting circuits, main and auxiliary machinery, impressed anodes, and individual motors.
  • To ensure emergency lighting systems, batteries or emergency generators are maintained in good working condition and available for immediate use.
  • To liaise closely with all department heads in order to ascertain the full requirements of the ship and ensure that the ship is maintained electrically in full operational order.
  • To maintain close liaison with the Chief Engineer/Chief Officer on the day-to-day work requirement of the Engine/Deck Department.
  • To keep careful account of all electrical spare gear and consumable stores, ensuring that their distribution, stowage, labelling, accounting, and security are efficiently managed.
  • To ensure that stock levels are maintained at all times.

postedCompany.description:
We are PSA Marine, a leader in the maritime sector since 1964. From our early days as the Port of Singapore Authority to corporatisation as PSA Marine, we have played a vital role in Singapore’s growth as the world’s busiest container transhipment hub. Over the years, our business portfolio has expanded beyond core businesses – Towage and Pilotage, to marine advisory, ship-to-ship transfer, navigational audit, water supply by waterboat, crew transfer in the offshore wind industry, and training and consultancy services.


With our team of 1,800 dedicated employees and modern fleet of more than 70 tugs, we have a presence in Peru, Europe, Bangladesh, China (including Hong Kong and Taiwan), India, Oman, and Southeast Asia today.


We are committed to deliver only the best as we continue to be alongside our customers and stakeholders in every leg of their journey. Our commitment to excellence fuels our zeal to innovate and define the future of maritime for the generations ahead.
postedCompany.name: PSA MARINE (PTE) LTD

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
